POST /accounts/{account_id}/email/routin.description: Computes the Email Routing rule changes that would be needed to reconcile a Wrangler-managed desired ruleset. This endpoint is read-only and does not create, update, or delete rules.

catch_all_rules.description: Desired catch-all Email Routing rules managed by the deploying Worker.

actions.description: List actions for the catch-all routing rule.

items.description: Action for the catch-all routing rule.

type.description: Type of action for catch-all rule.

matchers.description: List of matchers for the catch-all routing rule.

target.description: Catch-all target to plan for, using the `*@domain` shape.

owner_worker_tag.description:
Public tag (script_tag) of the Worker that owns this rule. Required when
`source` is `wrangler`.

rules.description: Desired normal Email Routing rules managed by the deploying Worker.

matchers.description: Matching patterns to forward to your actions.

items.description: Matching pattern to forward your actions.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

matchers.description: Matching patterns to forward to your actions.

items.description: Matching pattern to forward your actions.

owner_worker_name.description: Name of the Wrangler-owned Worker that owns the remote rule, when available for display.

target.description: Canonical recipient address or catch-all target.

400.description: Error 2062: Unknown Email Routing domain. A desired address or catch-all target does not resolve to an Email Routing-enabled domain in this account.

403.description: Authentication error or missing account rule list permission.

422.description: Invalid plan input, such as malformed matchers/actions, duplicate targets, or an owner_worker_tag that does not resolve to a known Worker script.

POST /zones/{zone_id}/email/routing/rule.description: Rules consist of a set of criteria for matching emails (such as an email being sent to a specific custom email address) plus a set of actions to take on the email (like forwarding it to a specific destination address). Forward actions require all destination addresses to be verified.

items.description: Matching pattern to forward your actions.

Public tag (script_tag) of the Worker that owns this rule. Required when
`source` is `wrangler`.

400.description: Error 2054: Destination address is not verified. All forward action destination addresses must be verified before they can be used in rules.
